title: rayon -- Data Parallelism
description: Makes data-parallel programming effortless. Convert sequential iterators to parallel ones by replacing .iter() with .par_iter(). Rayon handles thread pool management, work stealing, and load balancing automatically.

commonPatterns.title: Parallel map with collect
Parallel sort
Parallel fold and reduce
Custom thread pool

whenToUse: When you have CPU-bound work that can be split across data: processing large collections, image manipulation, number crunching, parallel sorting, or any embarrassingly parallel workload.
alternatives: std::thread for manual threading, crossbeam for scoped threads and channels, tokio (for I/O-bound parallelism, not CPU-bound). For GPU parallelism: wgpu, vulkano.
